summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AfriWonder audit dashboard - both backend APIs and frontend UI are fully functional with excellent performance
passed_tests: All 10 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Frontend dashboard loads correctly with audit data
Navigation sidebar works - all 11 sections accessible
Score cards display correct values (58/100 global score, 108 screens, 115 routes)
Features section shows 12 expandable feature items with completion percentages
Revenue section displays all 10 revenue sources with projections
Live Streaming section shows critical status badge correctly
Priority/Plan d'Action section shows P0/P1/P2 action items (27 total)
Feature expansion functionality working (click to show/hide details)
Responsive design and UI styling working correctly
Data integration between backend and frontend working perfectly
